tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessApproveSkill.approveSkill
tools.description: Associates a skill with the organization under the customer's AWS account. If a skill is private, the user implicitly accepts access to this skill during enablement.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessAssociateContactWithAddressBook.associateContactWithAddressBook
tools.description: Associates a contact with a given address book.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessAssociateDeviceWithNetworkProfile.associateDeviceWithNetworkProfile
tools.description: Associates a device with the specified network profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessAssociateDeviceWithRoom.associateDeviceWithRoom
tools.description: Associates a device with a given room. This applies all the settings from the room profile to the device, and all the skills in any skill groups added to that room. This operation requires the device to be online, or else a manual sync is required.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessAssociateSkillGroupWithRoom.associateSkillGroupWithRoom
tools.description: Associates a skill group with a given room. This enables all skills in the associated skill group on all devices in the room.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessAssociateSkillWithSkillGroup.associateSkillWithSkillGroup
tools.description: Associates a skill with a skill group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessAssociateSkillWithUsers.associateSkillWithUsers
tools.description: Makes a private skill available for enrolled users to enable on their devices.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateAddressBook.createAddressBook
tools.description: Creates an address book with the specified details.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateBusinessReportSchedule.createBusinessReportSchedule
tools.description: Creates a recurring schedule for usage reports to deliver to the specified S3 location with a specified daily or weekly interval.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateConferenceProvider.createConferenceProvider
tools.description: Adds a new conference provider under the user's AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateContact.createContact
tools.description: Creates a contact with the specified details.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateGatewayGroup.createGatewayGroup
tools.description: Creates a gateway group with the specified details.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateNetworkProfile.createNetworkProfile
tools.description: Creates a network profile with the specified details.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateProfile.createProfile
tools.description: Creates a new room profile with the specified details.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateRoom.createRoom
tools.description: Creates a room with the specified details.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateSkillGroup.createSkillGroup
tools.description: Creates a skill group with a specified name and description.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessCreateUser.createUser
tools.description: Creates a user.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteAddressBook.deleteAddressBook
tools.description: Deletes an address book by the address book ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteBusinessReportSchedule.deleteBusinessReportSchedule
tools.description: Deletes the recurring report delivery schedule with the specified schedule ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteConferenceProvider.deleteConferenceProvider
tools.description: Deletes a conference provider.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteContact.deleteContact
tools.description: Deletes a contact by the contact ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteDevice.deleteDevice
tools.description: Removes a device from Alexa For Business.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteDeviceUsageData.deleteDeviceUsageData
tools.description: When this action is called for a specified shared device, it allows authorized users to delete the device's entire previous history of voice input data and associated response data. This action can be called once every 24 hours for a specific shared device.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteGatewayGroup.deleteGatewayGroup
tools.description: Deletes a gateway group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteNetworkProfile.deleteNetworkProfile
tools.description: Deletes a network profile by the network profile ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteProfile.deleteProfile
tools.description: Deletes a room profile by the profile ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteRoom.deleteRoom
tools.description: Deletes a room by the room ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteRoomSkillParameter.deleteRoomSkillParameter
tools.description: Deletes room skill parameter details by room, skill, and parameter key ID.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteSkillAuthorization.deleteSkillAuthorization
tools.description: Unlinks a third-party account from a skill.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteSkillGroup.deleteSkillGroup
tools.description: Deletes a skill group by skill group ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDeleteUser.deleteUser
tools.description: Deletes a specified user by user ARN and enrollment ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDisassociateContactFromAddressBook.disassociateContactFromAddressBook
tools.description: Disassociates a contact from a given address book.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDisassociateDeviceFromRoom.disassociateDeviceFromRoom
tools.description: Disassociates a device from its current room. The device continues to be connected to the Wi-Fi network and is still registered to the account. The device settings and skills are removed from the room.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDisassociateSkillFromSkillGroup.disassociateSkillFromSkillGroup
tools.description: Disassociates a skill from a skill group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDisassociateSkillFromUsers.disassociateSkillFromUsers
tools.description: Makes a private skill unavailable for enrolled users and prevents them from enabling it on their devices.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessDisassociateSkillGroupFromRoom.disassociateSkillGroupFromRoom
tools.description: Disassociates a skill group from a specified room. This disables all skills in the skill group on all devices in the room.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessForgetSmartHomeAppliances.forgetSmartHomeAppliances
tools.description: Forgets smart home appliances associated to a room.

tools.description: Gets address the book details by the address book ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetConferenceProvider.getConferenceProvider

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetContact.getContact
tools.description: Gets the contact details by the contact ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetDevice.getDevice
tools.description: Gets the details of a device by device ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetGateway.getGateway
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a gateway.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetGatewayGroup.getGatewayGroup
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a gateway group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetInvitationConfiguration.getInvitationConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the configured values for the user enrollment invitation email template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetNetworkProfile.getNetworkProfile
tools.description: Gets the network profile details by the network profile ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetProfile.getProfile
tools.description: Gets the details of a room profile by profile ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetRoom.getRoom
tools.description: Gets room details by room ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetRoomSkillParameter.getRoomSkillParameter
tools.description: Gets room skill parameter details by room, skill, and parameter key ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessGetSkillGroup.getSkillGroup
tools.description: Gets skill group details by skill group ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListBusinessReportSchedules.listBusinessReportSchedules
tools.description: Lists the details of the schedules that a user configured. A download URL of the report associated with each schedule is returned every time this action is called. A new download URL is returned each time, and is valid for 24 hours.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListConferenceProviders.listConferenceProviders
tools.description: Lists conference providers under a specific AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListDeviceEvents.listDeviceEvents
tools.description: Lists the device event history, including device connection status, for up to 30 days.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListGatewayGroups.listGatewayGroups
tools.description: Retrieves a list of gateway group summaries. Use GetGatewayGroup to retrieve details of a specific gateway group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListGateways.listGateways
tools.description: Retrieves a list of gateway summaries. Use GetGateway to retrieve details of a specific gateway. An optional gateway group ARN can be provided to only retrieve gateway summaries of gateways that are associated with that gateway group ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListSkills.listSkills
tools.description: Lists all enabled skills in a specific skill group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListSkillsStoreCategories.listSkillsStoreCategories
tools.description: Lists all categories in the Alexa skill store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListSkillsStoreSkillsByCategory.listSkillsStoreSkillsByCategory
tools.description: Lists all skills in the Alexa skill store by category.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListSmartHomeAppliances.listSmartHomeAppliances
tools.description: Lists all of the smart home appliances associated with a room.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessListTags.listTags
tools.description: Lists all tags for the specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessPutConferencePreference.putConferencePreference
tools.description: Sets the conference preferences on a specific conference provider at the account level.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessPutInvitationConfiguration.putInvitationConfiguration
tools.description: Configures the email template for the user enrollment invitation with the specified attributes.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessPutRoomSkillParameter.putRoomSkillParameter
tools.description: Updates room skill parameter details by room, skill, and parameter key ID. Not all skills have a room skill parameter.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessPutSkillAuthorization.putSkillAuthorization
tools.description: Links a user's account to a third-party skill provider. If this API operation is called by an assumed IAM role, the skill being linked must be a private skill. Also, the skill must be owned by the AWS account that assumed the IAM role.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessRegisterAvsDevice.registerAvsDevice
tools.description: Registers an Alexa-enabled device built by an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) using Alexa Voice Service (AVS).

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessRejectSkill.rejectSkill
tools.description: Disassociates a skill from the organization under a user's AWS account. If the skill is a private skill, it moves to an AcceptStatus of PENDING. Any private or public skill that is rejected can be added later by calling the ApproveSkill API.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessResolveRoom.resolveRoom
tools.description:
Determines the details for the room from which a skill request was invoked. This operation is used by skill developers.

To query ResolveRoom from an Alexa skill, the skill ID needs to be authorized. When the skill is using an AWS Lambda function, the skill is automatically authorized when you publish your skill as a private skill to your AWS account. Skills that are hosted using a custom web service must be manually authorized. To get your skill authorized, contact AWS Support with your AWS account ID that queries the ResolveRoom API and skill ID.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessRevokeInvitation.revokeInvitation
tools.description: Revokes an invitation and invalidates the enrollment URL.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchAddressBooks.searchAddressBooks
tools.description: Searches address books and lists the ones that meet a set of filter and sort criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchContacts.searchContacts
tools.description: Searches contacts and lists the ones that meet a set of filter and sort criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchDevices.searchDevices
tools.description: Searches devices and lists the ones that meet a set of filter criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchNetworkProfiles.searchNetworkProfiles
tools.description: Searches network profiles and lists the ones that meet a set of filter and sort criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchProfiles.searchProfiles
tools.description: Searches room profiles and lists the ones that meet a set of filter criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchRooms.searchRooms
tools.description: Searches rooms and lists the ones that meet a set of filter and sort criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchSkillGroups.searchSkillGroups
tools.description: Searches skill groups and lists the ones that meet a set of filter and sort criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSearchUsers.searchUsers
tools.description: Searches users and lists the ones that meet a set of filter and sort criteria.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSendAnnouncement.sendAnnouncement
tools.description: Triggers an asynchronous flow to send text, SSML, or audio announcements to rooms that are identified by a search or filter.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessSendInvitation.sendInvitation
tools.description: Sends an enrollment invitation email with a URL to a user. The URL is valid for 30 days or until you call this operation again, whichever comes first.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessStartDeviceSync.startDeviceSync
tools.description:
Resets a device and its account to the known default settings. This clears all information and settings set by previous users in the following ways:

  • Bluetooth - This unpairs all bluetooth devices paired with your echo device.

  • Volume - This resets the echo device's volume to the default value.

  • Notifications - This clears all notifications from your echo device.

  • Lists - This clears all to-do items from your echo device.

  • Settings - This internally syncs the room's profile (if the device is assigned to a room), contacts, address books, delegation access for account linking, and communications (if enabled on the room profile).

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessStartSmartHomeApplianceDiscovery.startSmartHomeApplianceDiscovery
tools.description: Initiates the discovery of any smart home appliances associated with the room.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessTagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Adds metadata tags to a specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes metadata tags from a specified resource.

tools.description: Updates the contact details by the contact ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessUpdateDevice.updateDevice
tools.description: Updates the device name by device ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessUpdateGateway.updateGateway
tools.description: Updates the details of a gateway. If any optional field is not provided, the existing corresponding value is left unmodified.

tools.description: Updates the details of a gateway group. If any optional field is not provided, the existing corresponding value is left unmodified.

tools.description: Updates a network profile by the network profile ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAlexaForBusinessUpdateProfile.updateProfile
tools.description: Updates an existing room profile by room profile ARN.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
